object_type: frozen empirical comparison protocol for DFM-MKC against baseline LCDM over ACT, Planck, DESI, BAO, lensing, and matter-power observables
purpose: Specify the comparison protocol required after the prediction-vector interface while explicitly deferring numerical likelihood execution and empirical conclusions.

datasets_declared.act_dr6: ACT DR6 CMB-only and lensing-compatible observable slots may be compared only after a trusted numerical prediction vector exists.
datasets_declared.planck: Planck CMB temperature, polarization, and lensing slots may be compared only after a trusted numerical prediction vector exists.
datasets_declared.desi: DESI BAO slots may be compared only after a trusted numerical prediction vector exists.
datasets_declared.matter_power: Matter-power and growth slots may be compared only after a trusted numerical prediction vector exists.
datasets_declared.weak_lensing: Weak-lensing slots may be compared only after a trusted numerical prediction vector exists.

comparison_contract.baseline_model: LCDM baseline prediction vector with matched dataset schema.
comparison_contract.candidate_model: DFM-MKC prediction vector with matched dataset schema.
comparison_contract.schema_requirement: Both vectors must share observable names, ordering, units, masks, covariance convention, and redshift or ell indexing.
comparison_contract.covariance_requirement: Each comparison must bind an explicit covariance matrix or likelihood object before scoring.
comparison_contract.blindness_requirement: Parameter choices and model-selection criteria must be frozen before empirical scoring.
comparison_contract.reproducibility_requirement: All data hashes, code versions, solver settings, and parameter files must be recorded.

metrics.status: Metric names are specified only; no metric values are computed.

acceptance_thresholds.minimum_protocol_gate: All datasets, prediction vectors, covariance objects, masks, and parameter-freeze records must exist before any comparison run.
acceptance_thresholds.empirical_claim_gate: No empirical validation claim may be made from this protocol alone.
acceptance_thresholds.lambda_cdm_failure_gate: Lambda-CDM failure requires independent replicated evidence and is not reachable from this protocol object.
acceptance_thresholds.dark_matter_replacement_gate: Dark matter replacement requires independent physical and observational closure and is not reachable from this protocol object.

next_admissible_step: Supply DFM_MKC_NUMERICAL_BOLTZMANN_SOLVER_V1 or a trusted external solver-binding object before any likelihood run.
